heading: Removal of duplicative appraisals
label: 5137 Removal of duplicative appraisals
text: Notwithstanding any other law (including regulations), in making loans under , borrowers who are Indian tribes, members of Indian tribes, or tribal corporations shall only be required to obtain 1 appraisal under an appraisal standard recognized as of , by the Secretary or the Secretary of the Interior.section 5136 of this titleFebruary 7, 2014
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 488a of this title
Definition of “Secretary”“Secretary” as meaning the Secretary of Agriculture, see , Agriculture.section 9001 of Title 7
